global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with late-night deals.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Three food containers
elements.description: Three stylized food containers are depicted in a minimalist design, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: The logo 'PlateSprint' is displayed in bold, modern typography at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Food offer text
elements.description: The text 'Fast food, fast' is presented in a clear, bold font, emphasizing the quick service.

elements.label: Additional offer details
elements.description: The phrase 'Late-night deals available' is shown in a smaller font beneath the main offer text.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Order now' is prominently displayed at the bottom, inviting action.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Late-night deals available

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is shown in a bold font, positioned just above the call-to-action button.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, fast food delivery, late-night deals
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main offer text, additional details, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast, Late-night deals available, PlateSprint, Order now, €9.99
